arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Real Madrid: Los Blancos equal unwanted 16-year record in dreadful night at the Emirates
arts.sum: Real Madrid equal an unwanted 16-year Champions League club record following their 3-0 defeat away to Arsenal in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: ‘What are the odds?’ – Declan Rice’s free-kick double delights Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Mikel Merino then capped a stunning 3-0 win for Arsenal over Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice reveals Bukayo Saka's advice inspired his first free-kick goal against Real Madrid after he IGNORED Martin Odegaard's instruction
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES: A jubilant Declan Rice said he had 'the best feeling in the world' after striking two astonishing free-kicks as Arsenal blew away Real Madrid at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham admits Real Madrid ‘nowhere near it’ against Arsenal
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham admitted that Real Madrid were far off the pace during their 3-0 defeat to Arsenal in the first leg of the Uefa Champions League quarter-finals. Declan Rice scored two stunning free kicks within 12 minutes of each other before Mikel Merino netted the Gunners’ third with a superb finish late on. Arsenal are […] The post Jude Bellingham admits Real Madrid ‘nowhere near it’ against Arsenal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer blasts Jude Bellingham decision as Real Madrid can't avoid Arsenal suspension nightmare
arts.sum: Alan Shearer believes Jude Bellingham was fortunate not to have picked up a yellow card during Arsenal's thrashing of Real Madrid in their UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg meeting. Even if Bellingham had picked up a booking, he was not one of Real's six stars at risk of suspension for the second leg had he accumulated another this season.

arts.ttl: How Kylian Mbappe made Declan Rice change his mind on stunning Arsenal free-kick vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Declan Rice has revealed that Kylian Mbappe helped make up his mind on the second of his two free-kick goals against Real Madrid in Arsenal's stunning Champions League win at the Emirates Stadium. But Rice told Amazon Prime after the game that his second effort would have been very different - but for Real Madrid star Mbappe.

arts.ttl: What Martin Odegaard and Jorginho did after Declan Rice's second Arsenal free-kick vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal did take a deserved lead on 58 minutes with Rice scoring a sublime free-kick from 25-yards that left Courtois with no chance after hitting the ball with such ferocity as it curled inside the post The hosts were so close to doubling their lead shortly after as Martinelli and two efforts from Mikel Merino almost found a way into the net. Arsenal will take a 3-0 lead to Real Madrid for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie after an incredible night of football at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings as Declan Rice enters free-kick heaven vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal would claim the lead at the start of the second half with Declan Rice again involved in the biggest way, stepping up to curl in a direct free-kick. An early penalty call was waved away by VAR after Declan Rice saw a shot hit Raul Asencio on the arm.

arts.ttl: English Premier League secure extra Champions League place after Arsenal win
arts.sum: It's reached the business end of the season and the three European competitions have reached the quarter-final stages. Two nations will be awarded an extra place for the biggest club...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Real Madrid: Declan Rice ignored Nicolas Jover free-kick instruction before wonder goal
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice reveals an ignored instruction from set-piece coach Nicolas Jover in the Gunners' stunning 3-0 Champions League win over Real Madrid.
